productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Red Canvas Shoe
description: Perfect for casual days, these light-weight canvas shoes from numero uno are a great addition to your wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool, casual look.Upper Canvas upper for durability, sweat absorption enabling ventilation and easy maintenance Metallic eyelets on the medial side for ventilation Lace-up system with metallic eyelets for snug Fit and durability Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life and for style Long tongue with embroidered brand name Rubber toe box for durability and protection to the forefoot Branding printed on medial side Midsole Phylon midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Cambrelle lining the soft padded insole for excellent arch support PU foxing for the toe box Brand name embossed on the heel Outsole TPR outsole for durability Diamond grooves on the forefoot and front heel, with horizontal grooves in the back heel and diagonal grooves along the shoe periphery for maximum traction Shoe careKnock off loose dirt by smacking the sneakers togetherWipe with a damp cloth to remove caked dirtRinse shoes with warm waterScrub with mild detergent using a gentle toothbrushUse a non-bleaching soap for coloured canvasRinse off with cool water
